sections.paragraph:
ἀπερινόητος, ον (περινοέω ‘consider a matter thoroughly’; Epicurus p. 10, 5 Us.; Sext. Emp., Pyrrh. 2, 70 ed. Mutschm. v.l.; Damascius, De Princ. 4; TestSol 1:2 C; ParJer 9:6 [of God]; Philo, Mut. Nom. 15 [of God]; PGM 4, 1138) incomprehensible of the divine λόγος Dg 7:2.—DELG s.v. νόος.

Epicurus Epicurus , IV–III b.c.—List 5

Sext. Emp. Sext. Emp. = Sextus Empiricus, II–III a.d.—List 5

  1. ed. = edited (by), edition

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

ParJer ParJer = Paraleipomena Jeremiou, II? a.d.—List 2

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

Dg Dg = Letter of Diognetus, attributed to an unidentifiable apologist; II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 101
